summary: What 40 Podcasts Taught Me About Investing Over the last year, I recorded 40+ podcasts with CEOs, Fund Managers, Financial Coaches, Journalists and Authors — and one thing kept coming up again and again. Most of us are asking the wrong questions about money.

tool.label: Asset Allocator
tool.reason: Markets move, your plan should not. See the equity, debt and gold split that holds through the noise.

disclaimer: This podcast is for educational purposes only. Nothing discussed here should be considered financial advice. Please consult a SEBI-registered advisor before making investment decisions.

seo.title: 5 Money Lessons from 40 Financial Experts
